title: Design System: AI-Driven Development with TRAE SOLO

display.purpose: Page header h1 titles. Gold accent span for product branding.

headline.purpose: h3 section headings within article content. Clear weight contrast (600) from body.

body.purpose: All paragraph text. Line-height 1.7, max-width constrained to 75ch.

mono.purpose: Inline code snippets and code blocks. Bright mint for syntax context.

accent.purpose: Callout headers only. Handwritten cursive emphasis, warm gold color.

shadows.name: card-hover-glow
shadows.purpose: Gold-tinted hover glow on agent cards, outcome items, integration cards. Signals interactivity without lifting from plane.

shadows.name: doc-image-shadow
shadows.purpose: Applied to documentation images (screenshots). Subtle ambient drop shadow to distinguish from content surface.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Subtle hover lift on mode cards and tool comparison blocks. Standard dark shadow.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Default easing for all transitions — sidebar, buttons, hover states, animations.

motion.name: transition-standard
motion.purpose: Standard transition duration for hover/focus state changes.

motion.name: transition-identity
motion.purpose: Longer transition for identity-changing transforms (card hover lift with shadow).

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.purpose: Mobile breakpoint — sidebar collapses, full-width content, stacked buttons

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Tablet breakpoint — mode comparison collapses to single column, spec grid 1-col

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Overview sidebar disappears, content wrapper goes full-width

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Warm gold action button for next-step navigation and primary CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #E8C547; color: #0B1120; padding: 10px 20px; min-height: 44px; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; border-radius: 6px; border: none; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), filter 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); filter: brightness(1.05); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E8C547; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Ghost button with border for alternative navigation actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: transparent; color: #B8B5AC; padding: 10px 20px; min-height: 44px; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #1E3A5F; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: #D4A017; color: #F0EDE6; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E8C547; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation Link
components.description: Sidebar navigation link with active state showing left-border indicator.
components.html: Workshop OverviewGetting StartedVibe Coding
components.css: .ds-sidebar-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; } .ds-sidebar-link { display: block; padding: 6px 12px; color: #B8B5AC; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.85rem; border-radius: 6px; border-left: 2px solid transparent; transition: color 0.1s ease, background 0.1s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-sidebar-link:hover { color: #F0EDE6; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); } .ds-sidebar-link.active { color: #F0EDE6; background: #111C30; border-left-color: #F0EDE6; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Default Card
components.description: Content card with flat surface styling and gold hover glow response.
components.html:
Module Title

Learning description with brief overview of what the module covers.
components.css: .ds-card-default { background: #111C30; border: 1px solid #1E3A5F; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-card-default h4 { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #F0EDE6; margin: 0 0 10px; } .ds-card-default p { font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #B8B5AC; margin: 0; } .ds-card-default:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: #E8C547; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232, 197, 71, 0.15); }

components.name: Code Block
components.description: Terminal-style code block with midnight void background and deep ocean border.
components.css: .ds-code-block { background: #080E1A; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #1E3A5F; overflow-x: auto; margin: 20px 0; } .ds-code-content { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.85em; color: #00E59B; background: none; padding: 0; border: none; }

components.name: Default Callout
components.description: Gold-bordered callout with Caveat accent font for attention moments.
components.html:
Important

Make sure you have Node.js 18+ installed before running the setup command.
components.css: .ds-callout { border-left: 3px solid #E8C547; padding: 24px 28px; background: transparent; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; } .ds-callout-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-callout .ds-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #E8C547; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-callout .ds-callout-title { font-family: 'Caveat', cursive; font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 600; color: #E8C547; } .ds-callout p { font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; color: #B8B5AC; max-width: 65ch; margin: 0; }

components.name: Included Badge
components.description: Bright mint pill badge indicating feature inclusion.
components.css: .ds-badge-included { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 10px; background: #00E59B; color: #0B1120; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; }

narrative.overview: The Workshop Console is a dark command center where learning happens through doing. It channels the feeling of sitting at a focused workstation — deep navy surfaces recede into the background, letting content and code take center stage. Warm gold accents aren't decorative; they're signals pointing toward the next action, the next step, the thing that matters right now. The aesthetic is premium but never ostentatious. It respects the learner's intelligence: clear hierarchy, functional typography, interactive feedback that feels measured rather than theatrical.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first with a polished light theme — both feel intentional, not inverted
Single warm gold accent carrying all emphasis and interactivity signals
Tonal layering without shadows — depth through color shifts and precise borders
Three typefaces, each earning its place: sans for structure, mono for code, handwritten for moments of human warmth
Refined motion with exponential easing — subtle transforms, no choreography

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Warm Workshop Gold is the sole accent. It appears on ≤10% of any screen. When gold is everywhere, it means nothing.

rules.name: The Mint Boundary
rules.body: Bright Mint (#00E59B) is code and tip indicators only. Never for buttons, links, or general emphasis.

rules.name: The Tonal Depth Rule
rules.body: Depth is conveyed through background color progression (#0B1120 → #111C30 → #162540) and 1px borders in deep ocean blue. Shadows are secondary.

rules.name: The Grotesk Commitment
rules.body: Space Grotesk carries structure end-to-end. Weight (400→500→600→700) and size create hierarchy — no additional families for headings.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No shadows at rest. The interface reads as a flat plane with color zones defining structure. Shadows emerge only as interactive feedback.

dos: Do use Warm Workshop Gold (#E8C547) as the sole accent, limited to ≤10% of any screen area.
Do convey depth through tonal layering with 1px borders before reaching for shadows.
Do apply 2px gold outline offset by 2px on all interactive focus states.
Do use Space Grotesk weight contrast as the primary hierarchy mechanism.
Do reserve Caveat font exclusively for callout titles.
Do use ease-out-quint for all transitions at 0.2–0.3s duration.
Do provide a complete light-theme counterpart — both themes equally intentional.
donts: Don't use corporate enterprise templates with generic stock imagery and dry formatting (PRODUCT.md anti-reference).
Don't include playful or childish interfaces with cartoonish elements or casual styling (PRODUCT.md anti-reference).
Don't create dense wall-of-text documentation with poor visual hierarchy (PRODUCT.md anti-reference).
Don't use Bright Mint for general UI elements outside code syntax and tip callouts.
Don't introduce additional font families — Space Grotesk carries structure with weight and size.
Don't apply shadows at rest on surfaces or cards.
Don't use pure black or pure white as text or background in dark theme.
Don't apply gold to more than ~10% of any screen.
Don't animate CSS layout properties — use transforms and opacity only.
Don't use border-left greater than 3px as a colored stripe.
